fluxPipeline.heading: Transform patient outcomes through intelligent care pipelines

stages.label: Genomics
stages.title: Whole-genome sequencing analysis
stages.description: Process 3 billion base pairs in under 4 hours — identifying pathogenic variants, pharmacogenomic markers, and hereditary risk profiles with 99.97% accuracy.
stages.alt: DNA sequencing visualization in a genomics laboratory

stages.label: Imaging AI
stages.title: Diagnostic imaging intelligence
stages.description: Deep learning models detect tumors, fractures, and anomalies in CT, MRI, and X-ray scans — flagging critical findings for radiologist review within 90 seconds.
stages.alt: Medical imaging scan on a diagnostic display

stages.label: Trials
stages.title: Clinical trial patient matching
stages.description: AI matches patient profiles against 40,000+ active trials globally — surfacing eligible studies ranked by efficacy potential and geographic accessibility.
stages.alt: Clinical research team reviewing trial data

stages.label: Discovery
stages.title: In-silico drug discovery
stages.description: Simulate molecular interactions across billions of compound libraries — accelerating lead identification from years to weeks using quantum-accelerated docking models.
stages.alt: Molecular structure model for drug discovery research

stages.label: Data Vault
stages.title: HIPAA-compliant patient vault
stages.description: Zero-trust architecture encrypts PHI at rest and in transit — with granular consent management and full audit trails for every data access event.

stages.label: Telehealth
stages.title: Orchestrated telehealth delivery
stages.description: Unified platform connects patients, providers, and specialists across video, async messaging, and remote monitoring — with AI triage routing urgent cases in real time.
stages.alt: Doctor conducting a telehealth consultation via video
